arguments.content:
# Phase 3: Operational Playbook
## AI Workflow Automation for Legal/Consulting Verticals

**Document Version:** 1.0  
**Last Updated:** 2024-01-15  
**Owner:** Operations Team  
**Classification:** Internal Use

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Deployment Procedures](#1-deployment-procedures)
2. [Monitoring Framework](#2-monitoring-framework)
3. [Incident Response](#3-incident-response)
4. [Appendices](#4-appendices)

---

## 1. Deployment Procedures

### 1.1 Pre-Deployment Checklist

#### Environment Verification
| Component | Check | Owner | Status |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|
| Infrastructure provisioning | Cloud resources allocated | DevOps | ☐ |
| Security baseline | Firewall rules, IAM configured | Security | ☐ |
| Data pipeline | ETL flows tested | Data Eng | ☐ |
| Model validation | Accuracy benchmarks met | ML Team | ☐ |
| API endpoints | Health checks passing | Backend | ☐ |
| Integration tests | All critical paths green | QA | ☐ |
| Rollback plan | Documented and tested | DevOps | ☐ |

#### Legal/Compliance Verification
- [ ] Data processing agreements (DPAs) signed with client
- [ ] HIPAA/GDPR/SOC2 compliance validated for environment
- [ ] Model bias audit completed and documented
- [ ] Audit logging enabled for all data access
- [ ] Retention policies configured per client requirements

### 1.2 Deployment Pipeline

```
┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐
│   Build     │───▶│   Stage     │───▶│   Validate  │───▶│  Production │
│   (CI)      │    │   (UAT)     │    │   (Canary)  │    │  (Full)     │
└─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘
      │                  │                  │                  │
   Git commit       Client sign-off      5% traffic      100% traffic
   Unit tests       Integration tests    30-min bake     Continuous monitoring
```

#### Stage Environment Deployment (UAT)
1. **Trigger:** Client QA approval + internal QA sign-off
2. **Duration:** 24-48 hours minimum
3. **Gates:**
   - All P0 test cases pass
   - Performance benchmarks: <200ms p95 latency
   - Zero critical security findings
   - Client acceptance testing completed

#### Canary Deployment
1. **Initial Rollout:** 5% of traffic to new version
2. **Monitoring Window:** 30 minutes
3. **Auto-Rollback Triggers:**
   - Error rate > 0.5%
   - Latency degradation > 20%
   - Any P1 alert triggered
4. **Gradual Ramp:** 5% → 25% → 50% → 100% (15-min intervals)

### 1.3 Deployment Commands

```bash
# Production deployment (requires two approvers)
./deploy.sh --env=production --version=$VERSION --approver1=$ENG --approver2=$PM

# Emergency hotfix (fast-tracked, single approver)
./deploy.sh --env=production --version=$VERSION --hotfix --approver=$ENG

# Rollback to previous version (automatic if canary fails)
./rollback.sh --env=production --to-version=$PREVIOUS_VERSION
```

### 1.4 Post-Deployment Verification

**Immediate (0-5 min):**
- [ ] All pods/containers healthy
- [ ] Database connections established
- [ ] External API integrations responding

**Short-term (5-30 min):**
- [ ] Error rates within SLA (<0.1%)
- [ ] Latency p95 < 200ms
- [ ] Queue depths normal
- [ ] Client smoke tests passing

**Follow-up (24 hours):**
- [ ] Daily usage reports generated
- [ ] No client escalations
- [ ] Cost metrics within budget

---

## 2. Monitoring Framework

### 2.1 Monitoring Stack Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        Visual Layer                            │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐        │
│  │   Grafana    │  │   PagerDuty  │  │   Client     │        │
│  │  Dashboards  │  │   Alerts     │  │   Portal     │        │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Metrics & Logs Layer                      │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐        │
│  │  Prometheus  │  │    Datadog   │  │   Splunk     │        │
│  │   (infra)    │  │   (APM/RUM)  │  │   (logs)     │        │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Collection Layer                          │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐        │
│  │   App APM    │  │  Infra Agent │  │  Log Shipper │        │
│  │  (OpenTelemetry) │ (Node Exporter) │  (Fluentd)   │        │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Key Metrics Dashboard

#### Business Metrics (Client-Facing)
| Metric | Target | Alert Threshold | Frequency |
|--------|--------|-----------------|-----------|
| Document processing time | <30s | >60s | Real-time |
| Workflow completion rate | >95% | <90% | Hourly |
| Client satisfaction score | >4.5/5 | <4.0 | Weekly |
| SLA compliance | >99.5% | <99% | Real-time |

#### Technical Metrics (Internal)
| Metric | Target | Warning | Critical |
|--------|--------|---------|----------|
| API response time (p99) | <200ms | >300ms | >500ms |
| Error rate | <0.1% | >0.5% | >1% |
| CPU utilization | <70% | >80% | >90% |
| Memory utilization | <75% | >85% | >95% |
| Queue depth | <100 | >500 | >1000 |
| Database connections | <80% | >90% | >95% |

#### AI/ML Specific Metrics
| Metric | Target | Alert Threshold |
|--------|--------|-----------------|
| Model inference time | <100ms | >200ms |
| Prediction confidence | >0.85 avg | <0.70 avg |
| Hallucination rate | <1% | >2% |
| Bias drift (demographic) | <0.05 | >0.10 |
| Concept drift | Monitor | >0.15 |

### 2.3 Alert Tiers

#### P0 - Critical (Immediate Response Required)
- **Response SLA:** 15 minutes
- **Escalation:** Auto-page on-call + backup after 10 min
- **Examples:**
  - Complete service outage
  - Data breach detection
  - Client workflow paralysis (>100 users affected)
  - Compliance violation in progress

#### P1 - High (Response Within 1 Hour)
- **Response SLA:** 1 hour
- **Escalation:** Page on-call, manager notification after 2 hours
- **Examples:**
  - Degraded performance affecting >25% users
  - Security vulnerability detected (non-exploited)
  - Data pipeline failure (backup active)
  - Integration partner outage

#### P2 - Medium (Response Within 4 Hours)
- **Response SLA:** 4 hours
- **Escalation:** Ticket assignment, daily digest
- **Examples:**
  - Single client workflow disruption
  - Warning threshold breaches
  - Non-critical integration failures

#### P3 - Low (Response Within 24 Hours)
- **Response SLA:** Next business day
- **Escalation:** Backlog tracking
- **Examples:**
  - Minor UI issues
  - Documentation updates needed
  - Optimization opportunities

### 2.4 Runbooks

#### Runbook: High API Latency
1. Check current traffic patterns (Datadog → Traffic dashboard)
2. Verify auto-scaling status (`kubectl get hpa`)
3. Check database performance (query slow log)
4. Review recent deployments (incident correlation)
5. If database issue: Implement read replica failover
6. If traffic spike: Temporarily increase rate limits
7. Update status page if client-impacting

#### Runbook: Model Inference Failures
1. Check model service health endpoints
2. Verify GPU resources available (`nvidia-smi`)
3. Check model version matches expected
4. Review input data validation logs
5. If model version issue: Rollback to stable version
6. If input issue: Implement temporary sanitization

# Phase 3: Customer Onboarding Workflow Templates
## AI Workflow Automation for Legal/Consulting Verticals

**Document Version:** 1.0  
**Last Updated:** 2024-01-15  
**Owner:** Customer Success Team  
**Classification:** Client-Facing (Internal Processes)

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Onboarding Overview](#1-onboarding-overview)
2. [Phase-Based Onboarding Templates](#2-phase-based-onboarding-templates)
3. [Role-Specific Onboarding Tracks](#3-role-specific-onboarding-tracks)
4. [Workflow Templates](#4-workflow-templates)
5. [Checklists & Deliverables](#5-checklists--deliverables)

---

## 1. Onboarding Overview

### 1.1 Onboarding Philosophy

**Goal:** Transform new clients from contract signature to full platform utilization within 90 days.

**Success Metrics:**
| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Time to First Value (TTFV) | <14 days | First completed workflow |
| Time to Full Deployment | <90 days | All modules active |
| User Activation Rate | >80% | >3 logins in first 30 days |
| Training Completion | >90% | All required modules |
| CSAT Score | >4.5/5 | Post-onboarding survey |

### 1.2 Stakeholder Map

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

## AI Workflow Automation for Legal/Consulting Verticals

**Owner:** Support Operations Team

---

---

## 1. Support Model Overview

### 1.1 Tier Structure

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      SUPPORT TIER MODEL                        │
│                                                                 │
│    Tier 1          Tier 2           Tier 3         Engineering │
│   (L1 Support)    (L2 Technical)   (L3 Escalation)  (L4 Dev)   │
│       │               │                │                │         │
│   Front-line      Technical       Subject Matter    Product    │
│   Triage
